summary: Complete testing of SDM Fintech Phase 2 features. Backend: 100% (12/12 tests passed). Frontend: All FintechDashboard tabs working correctly including new Investor Dashboard, Config panel, Float management, and Ledger transactions.
passed_tests: GET /api/sdm/admin/config - Returns full configuration with fintech settings
PUT /api/sdm/admin/config - Updates commission rate, withdrawal fee, pending days, thresholds
GET /api/sdm/admin/fintech/float/status - Returns float balance, alert level, coverage ratio
GET /api/sdm/admin/fintech/investor-dashboard - Returns GMV, commissions, growth metrics
GET /api/sdm/admin/fintech/wallets - Returns all wallet types (CLIENT, MERCHANT, SDM_*)
GET /api/sdm/admin/fintech/wallets?entity_type=X - Filter by wallet type works
GET /api/sdm/admin/fintech/transactions - Returns ledger transactions with double-entry records
POST /api/sdm/merchant/transaction - Direct Payment flow creates correct splits (merchant/client/SDM)
Direct Payment - Merchant wallet auto-created and credited with net amount
Direct Payment - SDM Commission wallet credited correctly
Direct Payment - Client pending balance updated with cashback
Config changes affect new transactions (tested with 5% commission)
GET /api/sdm/admin/fintech/summary - Returns complete financial overview
UI: FintechDashboard loads with data-testid='fintech-dashboard'
UI: Investor tab shows GMV (GHS 3,950), Commission (GHS 8.44), Transaction Count (13)
UI: Investor tab shows Total Users (6), Merchants (17, 1 Active)
UI: Investor tab shows Daily GMV & Commission chart
UI: Config tab shows Commission & Fees section with editable fields
UI: Config tab shows Float Alert Thresholds section
UI: Config tab shows Current Active Configuration display
UI: Config tab Save Configuration button present
UI: Float tab shows Float Balance (GHS 3,500) with threshold info
UI: Float tab shows Pending Withdrawals count and Coverage Ratio
UI: Float tab shows Top Up Float form
UI: Wallets tab shows All Wallets (14) with all 5 types
UI: Ledger tab shows Ledger Transactions (10) with PAY and DEP references
UI: Ledger tab shows Export CSV and Export JSON buttons

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 9 tabs working: Investor, Overview, Withdrawals, Deposits, Float, Wallets, Ledger, Config, Audit)

seed_data_creation: Multiple test merchants and transactions created during testing. Direct Payment flow tested with various amounts (100, 200, 500, 1000 GHS). SDM Commission wallet accumulated fees from test transactions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Fintech features fully tested. Direct Payment Transaction flow verified - when client pays via QR scan, system correctly splits to merchant (net), client cashback (pending), and SDM commission. Config panel allows dynamic updates to commission rate (2%), withdrawal fee (1.5 GHS), pending days (5), and float thresholds. Float management shows balance (GHS 3,500), pending withdrawals, and coverage ratio. Investor Dashboard provides GMV/commission metrics with growth percentages.

mocked_integrations.Mobile Money Payout (MTN/Vodafone): MOCKED - Actual disbursement API not integrated. Admin manually marks withdrawal as PAID with provider_reference.
mocked_integrations.Hubtel SMS: Configured but SMS not sent without credentials

features_verified.direct_payment_transaction: ✅ Working - Client pays, system auto-splits to merchant/client/SDM
features_verified.config_panel: ✅ Working - Commission rate, withdrawal fee, pending days, thresholds configurable
features_verified.float_status: ✅ Working - Balance, alert level, coverage ratio displayed
features_verified.investor_dashboard: ✅ Working - GMV, commissions, transaction counts with growth metrics
features_verified.wallets_display: ✅ Working - All 5 wallet types visible with correct balances
features_verified.ledger_transactions: ✅ Working - Double-entry accounting with PAY/DEP transactions
features_verified.fintech_dashboard_tabs: ✅ Working - All 9 tabs functional (Investor, Overview, Withdrawals, Deposits, Float, Wallets, Ledger, Config, Audit)
